meta.name: PRSM RECOVERY: Unpause FTNSBridge
meta.description: Resumes bridge operations after pause. PRECONDITIONS for cosigning: (1) bridge patch deployed if vulnerability triggered pause, (2) cross-chain reconciliation complete (verify bridgedOut == bridgedIn delta is intentional), (3) auditor sign-off if patch deployed, (4) public bridge-resumption announcement queued. See EXPLOIT_RESPONSE_PLAYBOOK.md §4 (Recover phase).
